message:
fix(node): use saturating_add for session sequence numbers and epsilon for float comparison

- session_auth.rs: Replace bare `sequence + 1` with
  `sequence.saturating_add(1)` in both send_seq and recv_seq
  advancement to prevent overflow panic on u64::MAX sequences.
- sybil_defense.rs: Replace `total_weight == 0.0` with
  `total_weight.abs() < f64::EPSILON` in weighted aggregation to
  avoid false-positive zero detection from floating-point rounding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
